verbGlossary.CONDITIONED ON: {source} or award is conditional upon {target} or approval being obtained before work can proceed
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} scope and execution must comply with {target} approved plans and conditions
verbGlossary.CONTINGENT ON: {source} or notice to proceed cannot be issued until the required {target} is in hand
verbGlossary.REQUIRED FOR: {source} is issued specifically to procure materials or services needed to satisfy {target} requirement
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINED BY: {source} must operate within the limitations and conditions imposed by the environmental or stormwater {target}
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: Insurance {target} must be on file as mandated by OSHA notification and regulatory safety requirements
verbGlossary.VERIFIED THROUGH: {source} certification is validated through the labor compliance verification process
verbGlossary.PREREQUISITE FOR: {source} milestone (substantial or final completion) must be achieved before {target} can be issued
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED FOR: {source} is submitted to the authority having jurisdiction to obtain the compliance letter
verbGlossary.ACCOUNTS FOR: {source} includes scope and cost for required {target} inspections as part of the contractor's responsibility
verbGlossary.OBLIGATES: {source} contractually require the contractor to arrange and pay for special inspections
verbGlossary.ACTIVATED UPON: {source} period begins upon issuance of the temporary {target}, triggering coverage obligations
verbGlossary.FILED WITH: {source}documentation is filed alongside labor compliance records for regulatory reporting
verbGlossary.SECURED FOR: {source} is required as a condition of {target} to guarantee project completion
verbGlossary.DELAYED BY: {source} is negatively affected when {target} cycle times extend, creating procurement uncertainty
verbGlossary.EXTENDED BY: {source} cycle time increases when regulatory holds delay {target} issuance, pushing back contract execution
